features.featureTitle: Replace the image displayed in the first menu item card (article 1, XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[2]/div[1]/div[2]/article[1]/div[1]/div[1]) with the correct original Mexican food image from version 9. The current image shows Chinese food and must be replaced with the authentic Mexican food image that was present on the live website at version 9.
